name: tailwindcss-scroll-effects
description: Advanced Tailwind CSS plugin for scroll-based animations and parallax effects

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.readdirSync('dist').forEach(f => { if(f.endsWith('.js')) fs.copyFileSync('dist/' + f, 'playground/' + f) })"

author: nidhidipak
